titleJa: agent SDK は coding 補助の外へ広がり、汎用 workflow の部品になり始める
titleEn: Agent SDKs are expanding beyond coding assistance into general workflow components
summaryJa: 2025年10月時点では、Claude Agent SDK、Agent Factory、Firestore 対応 MCP Toolbox がそろい、agent SDK がコード補助専用ではなく、汎用の agentic app を組み立てるための部品へ広がっていた。
summaryEn: By October 2025, the Claude Agent SDK, Agent Factory, and Firestore-enabled MCP Toolbox all pointed to agent SDKs becoming building blocks for general agentic applications rather than just coding tools.

publishedSources.label: Agent S: An Open Agentic Framework that Uses Computers Like a Human
RE-Bench: Evaluating Frontier AI R&D Capabilities of Language Model Agents against Human Experts
Google Cloud: Introducing Looker MCP Server
Google Cloud: Firestore support and custom tools in MCP Toolbox
Anthropic: Building agents with the Claude Agent SDK
Microsoft Azure: Agent Factory, designing the open agentic web stack
